prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第63名，近年排名稳定在60-70区间，属于中上游211师范院校；2024年声誉偏负 面（副教授性骚扰事件），但2026年声誉数据中未见该校明显负面信号；抖音热度总排名第15（高热），短视频曝光度高，反映报考关注度较高；中国语言文学 A-、心理学A-、教育学A-，3个A-学科，在师范类院校中实力较强，对理科考生报考师范类专业有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2024年评估为\"分化 观望\"，热度指数55.84；计算机类、电子信息等理科热门专业热度较高，但该校理科招生专业以师范类为主；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年增加约15.6%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约38996名、2026年大幅扩招80%及本省考生增加约15.6%，扩招效应显著大于考生增加效应，预计录取位次 明显后移；预测最低位次约57814名，区间57314-58314名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest rank for science was approximately 33,156; in 2024, approximately 23,113; in 2025, approximately 38,996 for the Physics Category. Fluctuations have been significant over the past three years, with an abnormal forward shift in 2024 and a fallback to about 38,996 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating trend. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for the science group (Physics Category): 2 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 5 in 2025, and 9 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 4 students (+80%), which will significantly lower the admission rank.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 60-70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 normal universities. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (associate professor sexual harassment incident), but no significant negative signals were seen in 2026 reputation data. Douyin popularity ranks 15th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable application attention. Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, three A- disciplines, showing strong strength among normal universities, attracting science candidates to apply for normal majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see', with a popularity index of 55.84. Popular science majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information have high popularity, but the university's science enrollment majors are mainly normal-oriented. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of about 38,996, the 80% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 15.6% increase in provincial candidates, the expansion effect significantly outweighs the candidate increase effect, leading to an expected significant backward shift in admission rank. The predicted lowest rank is about 57,814, with a range of 57,314-58,314.

- Computer Science and Technology (Normal) (Targeted Employment in Tibet)

- Geographic Science (Normal) (Targeted Employment in Tibet)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For ranks within the predicted range of 57,314-58,314, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 normal targeted majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 Mathematics/Computer Science as a reach, and Tier 3 Materials/Ethnic Minority Preparatory Course as safety. Due to the significant enrollment expansion in 2026, the admission rank is expected to shift backward noticeably; candidates with ranks slightly below the lower limit of the range can consider the Ethnic Minority Preparatory Course as a pathway to higher education.
